name: github-trend-automator
description: Daily GitHub Trending collection through a browser extension and local SQLite service.

scripts.check: node --check support/api/github-trending/server.js && node --check support/api/github-trending/scheduler.js && node --check support/api/github-trending/store.js && node --check plugins/trending-collector/background.js && node --check plugins/trending-collector/content-script.js
